name: Forced Nectar Feeding
descrip: Force an intoxicating aphrodisiac into your prey.
outcome: [AttackerName] pours her sweet nectar directly into [TargetName]'s mouth, forcing [TargetHimOrHer] to drink it!
miss: [AttackerName] pours her nectar directly into [TargetName]'s mouth, but [TargetHeOrShe] somehow manages to avoid swallowing it and spits it right back out!
statusOutcome: [TargetName] can feel the intoxicating nectar affecting [TargetHimOrHer].
